checklist.entry: Plan for progress tracking, cancellation, error reporting, logging and completion where the feature or SDK supports them.
Do not treat long-running tool calls as fire-and-forget operations; define progress, cancellation and timeout behaviour.
Keep logs free of credentials, personal data and unnecessary tool payloads.
Return and handle structured JSON-RPC errors for invalid parameters, missing resources and internal errors.
Make failure modes user-visible where action, consent or retry is required.
Preserve correlation IDs or trace references for audit and debugging.
